title: How Cursor builds agentic workflows across the SDLC
summary: Tido Carriero (VP of Engineering, Cursor) discusses how most companies hit a 40% productivity plateau with AI coding assistants and describes Cursor's approach to breaking past this limit by deploying agent systems across the entire software development lifecycle. He covers bug triage bots, security reviewers, PM and EM agents, and growth experiment pipelines, along with architectural decisions for autonomous agents and organizational shifts needed for the agent era.
